__fixture__.name: template_card_community_signature_review
__fixture__.scenario: Gallery row for a community-authored template whose signer changed. signer_continuity_class = signer_changed_review_required, so the row is visible-but-disabled with disabled_reason_code = signature_review_required and availability_narrowing_class = signature_review_required. A companion starter_policy_notice_record of class community_source_notice renders in-place with resolution hook review_signer_change. The bypass path bypass.clone_repository_without_starter remains at equal weight; the user can still clone the same underlying repository without attaching the community starter. The row demonstrates §3.2 community rules (signer_continuity required), §3.14 rules (in-place notice with typed class and resolution hook), §5.1 rule 3 (commit forbidden without a resolvable summary ref), and §11.5 (same-weight non-starter path preserved).
